about.meta.title: About Us | Methodology & Verification Standards | SocialClubsMaps
about.meta.description: Learn about our verification methodology for cannabis social clubs in Spain. Rigorous standards for a safe community.
about.title: About Us
mission.meta.title: Our Mission | Trust & Transparency | SocialClubsMaps
mission.meta.description: Our mission is to provide a safe, compliance-first navigation layer for Spain's cannabis social club culture.
mission.hero.title: Our Mission: Trust & Transparency
mission.hero.subtitle: We are building the verified navigation layer for Spain's cannabis social club culture.
mission.why.title: Why We Exist
mission.why.description: Navigating the cannabis landscape in Spain can be complex and risky for visitors. Our mission is to provide a safe, compliance-first layer that prioritizes education, harm reduction, and privacy.
mission.standards.title: Our Verification Standards
mission.standards.legal.title: Legal Compliance
mission.standards.legal.description: We verify that every club is a registered non-profit association in accordance with Spanish law.
mission.standards.privacy.title: Privacy First
mission.standards.privacy.description: Sensitive club details are never public. We use gated access to protect both clubs and members.
mission.standards.vetting.title: On-Site Vetting
mission.standards.vetting.description: Our team personally visits clubs to ensure they meet our high standards for safety and atmosphere.
mission.cta.title: Join the Trust Network
mission.cta.subtitle: Ready to navigate the culture safely?
legal.terms.title: Terms of Use
legal.terms.intro: SocialClubsMaps provides educational and informational content. We do not sell cannabis, broker transactions, or guarantee club acceptance. Users must comply with local laws, private association rules, and platform guidelines at all times.
legal.terms.educational.title: Educational Purpose
legal.terms.educational.body: Content is provided for educational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. Always verify current regulations and seek professional counsel when needed.
legal.terms.responsibility.title: User Responsibility
legal.terms.responsibility.body: You are responsible for lawful behavior, respectful conduct, and adherence to club policies. Public consumption and possession may carry administrative penalties under Spanish law.
legal.terms.no_transactions.title: No Transaction Facilitation
legal.terms.no_transactions.body: The platform does not facilitate direct drug transactions. Access-related workflows, where available, are limited to compliance-first educational and verification steps.
legal.privacy.title: Privacy Policy
legal.privacy.intro: We use data minimization principles. We only collect information necessary to provide educational content, account features, and safety-focused platform functionality.
legal.privacy.collect.title: What We Collect
legal.privacy.collect.body: We may collect account identifiers, contact details you provide, and usage data required for security, fraud prevention, and service improvement.
legal.privacy.use.title: How We Use Data
legal.privacy.use.body: Data is used to operate the platform, provide support, improve reliability, and maintain compliance-oriented safeguards. We do not sell personal data.
legal.privacy.controls.title: Your Controls
legal.privacy.controls.body: You can request access, correction, or deletion of personal data according to applicable law and platform policy.
legal.cookies.title: Cookie Policy
legal.cookies.intro: We use cookies and similar technologies for essential functionality, security, and consented analytics.
legal.cookies.essential.title: Essential Cookies
legal.cookies.essential.body: Required for core site functions such as language preference, session continuity, and security controls.
legal.cookies.analytics.title: Analytics Cookies
legal.cookies.analytics.body: Used only where applicable under consent rules to understand product performance and improve user experience.
legal.cookies.preferences.title: Managing Preferences
legal.cookies.preferences.body: You can adjust cookie preferences at any time through browser controls and future in-product preference settings.
tools.title: Interactive Tools
tools.subtitle: Smart utilities to help you navigate compliance and safety.

tools.cards.eligibility.description: Find out if you meet the legal requirements to join a private association in Spain.
tools.cards.fine_estimator.title: Fine Estimator

tools.cta.title: Want to be the first to use these tools?
tools.cta.description: Join our verified waitlist to get early access and our exclusive Visitor Safety Kit.

events.mock.1.description: Join the most prestigious cannabis competition in Europe. Top growers and extractors compete for excellence awards across multiple categories.

events.mock.3.name: Cannabis Expo Berlin 2025
events.mock.3.description: The largest B2B cannabis exhibition in Germany, featuring international exhibitors, networking events, and educational workshops.
events.mock.4.name: Cannabis Culture Festival Madrid
events.mock.4.description: Celebrate cannabis culture with live music, art exhibitions, educational talks, and community networking in the heart of Spain.
events.mock.5.name: Advanced Indoor Growing Workshop
events.mock.5.description: Master indoor cultivation techniques with expert growers. Learn about lighting, nutrients, environmental control, and organic pest management.
events.mock.6.name: European Cannabis Regulation Forum
events.mock.6.description: Join policymakers, industry leaders, and advocates to discuss the future of cannabis regulation across European markets.
editorial.subtitle: Authoritative guides on legal compliance, club etiquette, and harm reduction. Built by experts, verified by lawyers, designed for responsible adults.

editorial.mock.1.title: Is Weed Legal in Barcelona in 2026?
editorial.mock.1.excerpt: The real rules, fines, and grey areas explained. What every visitor needs to know before arriving.
editorial.mock.2.title: 5 Mistakes Tourists Make
editorial.mock.2.excerpt: Don't be "that" tourist. Learn the local norms and club etiquette before you arrive.
editorial.mock.3.title: Edibles Safety Guide
editorial.mock.3.excerpt: Start low, go slow. Essential harm reduction tips for cannabis edibles.
editorial.standards.title: Our Editorial Standards
editorial.standards.subtitle: Every article in our Knowledge Vault is researched, fact-checked, and reviewed by legal experts and harm reduction specialists.
editorial.standards.items.legal.title: Legally Verified
editorial.standards.items.legal.descript: Reviewed by legal professionals familiar with Spanish cannabis law
editorial.standards.items.harm_reduction: Prioritizing safety and responsible consumption above all
editorial.standards.items.updated.title: Regularly Updated
editorial.standards.items.updated.descri: Laws change. We monitor updates and revise content accordingly
safety_kit.title: The Spain Safety Kit
safety_kit.subtitle: A compliance-first field guide for travelers navigating Spain's cannabis social club culture: legal boundaries, etiquette, scam red flags, and harm-reduction essentials in one concise briefing.
safety_kit.cards.mistakes.title: Avoid Expensive Mistakes
safety_kit.cards.mistakes.description: Public-consumption and possession risk context, practical do/don't checklists, and tourist trap warnings.
safety_kit.cards.culture.title: Respect Club Culture
safety_kit.cards.culture.description: First-visit etiquette, privacy rules, and how to avoid behavior that gets people rejected.
safety_kit.cards.protect.title: Protect Yourself
safety_kit.cards.protect.description: Scam pattern detection, safer communication behavior, and personal-risk minimization basics.
safety.subtitle: Cannabis social clubs in Spain operate under a unique legal framework. Understanding the rules, risks, and best practices ensures you have a safe, enjoyable experience while respecting local laws.
safety.essential_knowledge.title: Essential Knowledge
safety.essential_knowledge.subtitle: Key information every club member should know
safety.categories.edibles.title: Edibles & Concentrates
safety.categories.edibles.description: Different rules apply to infused products. Onset times and dosing differ significantly from smoking.
safety.categories.edibles.tips.1: Wait 2+ hours before taking more - onset can take up to 2 hours
safety.categories.edibles.tips.2: Start with 5mg THC or less if you're new
safety.categories.edibles.tips.3: Effects last 4-12 hours vs 1-3 hours from smoking
safety.categories.edibles.tips.4: Edibles convert to more potent 11-hydroxy-THC in the liver
safety.categories.first_visit.title: First Club Visit
safety.categories.first_visit.descriptio: What to expect at your first visit to a cannabis social club.
safety.categories.first_visit.tips.1: Bring valid photo ID (passport or EU ID card)
safety.categories.first_visit.tips.2: Most clubs are cash-only for consumption fees
safety.categories.first_visit.tips.3: You'll sign a membership agreement and house rules
safety.categories.first_visit.tips.4: Ask staff about their strains and consumption areas
safety.categories.medical.title: Medical Considerations
safety.categories.medical.description: Important information for those with health conditions or on medications.
safety.categories.medical.tips.1: Cannabis can interact with blood pressure and heart medications
safety.categories.medical.tips.3: Start low and go slow with any new product
safety.categories.medical.tips.4: Consult your doctor if you have heart conditions
safety.categories.mental.title: Mental Health
safety.categories.mental.description: Understanding the psychological effects of cannabis.
safety.categories.mental.tips.1: High doses can cause anxiety or paranoia in some people
safety.categories.mental.tips.2: Take a break if you feel foggy or unmotivated
safety.categories.mental.tips.3: Cannabis can trigger underlying mental health conditions
safety.categories.mental.tips.4: Less is more - you can always take more, not less
safety.emergency.title: Emergency Information
safety.emergency.subtitle: Save these numbers. In case of medical emergency, be honest with healthcare providers about cannabis consumption.
safety.emergency.eu.title: EU Emergency
safety.emergency.hospitals.title: Barcelona Hospitals
safety.emergency.hospitals.2: Hospital de Sant Pau - C/ Sant Quinti 89

landing.faq.label: Intelligence
landing.faq.title: Everything You Need to Know
landing.faq.items.1.q: What is a Cannabis Social Club?
landing.faq.items.1.a: A private, non-profit association where members consume cannabis in a social setting. They are not shops; they are member-only establishments with strict protocols.
landing.faq.items.2.a: Personal use and private cultivation are decriminalized. Public consumption remains illegal and subject to administrative fines. CSCs operate in a legal grey zone.
landing.faq.items.3.q: Can I be rejected from a club?
landing.faq.items.3.a: Yes. Private associations have their own membership criteria and are not obligated to accept new members. Many clubs have closed lists.
landing.faq.items.4.q: What are the public consumption risks?
landing.faq.items.4.a: Fines range from EUR601 to EUR30,000 under Organic Law 4/2015. Confiscation of product is standard. Discretion is essential.
landing.faq.items.5.q: Why does privacy matter so much?
landing.faq.items.5.a: The legal protection of CSCs relies on their private, non-promotional nature. Respecting member privacy and neighbor silence is mandatory.
landing.faq.cta_description: Subscribe to the Intelligence Briefing or download the Safety Kit for deeper intelligence.

landing.reality.label: Reality Check
landing.reality.items.walkins.title: No Walk-ins
landing.reality.items.walkins.desc: Private associations require compliance with strict statutes and local ordinances. Expect rejection if you arrive without preparation.
landing.reality.items.public.title: Public Consumption
landing.reality.items.public.desc: Administrative fines range from EUR601 to EUR30,000. Privacy is your only protection from local authorities.
landing.reality.items.discretion.title: Discretion First
landing.reality.items.discretion.desc: No filming, no social media tagging, no neighbor noise. We are guests in these residential neighborhoods.
landing.reality.items.promoters.title: Avoid Promoters
landing.reality.items.promoters.desc: Street promoters and DM solicitations operate outside the legal framework and expose you to unnecessary risk.
landing.verification.items.legal.title: Legal Compliance Audit
landing.verification.items.privacy.title: Privacy Protection
Clear communication of rules and statutes.
landing.verification.label: Our Standard
landing.verification.title: The Verification Moat
landing.verification.description_line_1: We do not just list clubs. Every partner undergoes a multi-point verification process
landing.verification.description_line_2: to ensure they operate within the strict legal framework of Spanish private associations.
landing.weekly.label: Safety Briefing
landing.weekly.title: Barcelona Intelligence
landing.weekly.cards.legal.title: Legal Framework
landing.weekly.cards.legal.content: Catalonia regulatory landscape requires member discretion. Private associations operate under strict privacy rules that you should understand before visiting.
landing.weekly.cards.safety.title: Safety Protocol
landing.weekly.cards.safety.content: Stay safe by avoiding street promoters and fake storefronts. Legitimate associations never recruit in public spaces or near tourist landmarks.
landing.weekly.cards.harm.title: Harm Reduction
landing.weekly.cards.harm.content: Responsible consumption starts with respecting the neighborhood. Keep noise levels low after 10 PM to honor local residential agreements.
landing.eligibility.steps.age.q: Are you over 18 or 21 years old?
landing.eligibility.steps.age.desc: Age requirements vary by club. Most require 18+, premium clubs 21+.
landing.eligibility.steps.id.q: Do you have valid government photo ID?
landing.eligibility.steps.id.desc: Passports or EU ID cards required. Digital versions are rejected.
landing.eligibility.steps.intent.q: Joining for therapeutic or social use?
landing.eligibility.steps.intent.desc: Associations are not shops. Commercial intent is prohibited.
landing.eligibility.complete_description: You meet the primary preparedness requirements for Spanish association membership.
landing.eligibility.warning: Remember: bring your ID, arrive early, and always respect the house rules.
landing.fine.scenarios.serious.1: Consumption in public spaces near schools
editorial.culture.lead: From underground beginnings to cultural institutions. Discover how Spain's cannabis social clubs became a model for responsible adult use.
editorial.culture.timeline.1990s.title: The Movement Begins
editorial.culture.timeline.1990s.descrip: Activists start advocating for cannabis decriminalization. The concept of "cannabis clubs" emerges from social movements.
editorial.culture.timeline.2006_2010.des: Barcelona becomes the epicenter. The first formal clubs open, creating a new model for private consumption.
editorial.culture.timeline.present.title: A Growing Movement
editorial.culture.timeline.present.descr: Thousands of members across Spain. Continued evolution of the model and ongoing policy discussions.
editorial.culture.guides.1.title: The Barcelona Cannabis Club Movement
editorial.culture.guides.1.excerpt: How a protest movement became a cultural institution. The history behind Spain's unique model.
editorial.culture.guides.2.title: Interview: Club Founders on 20 Years of Change
editorial.culture.guides.2.excerpt: Perspectives from pioneers who shaped the movement from the beginning.
editorial.culture.guides.3.title: From Stigma to Acceptance
editorial.culture.guides.3.excerpt: How public perception has evolved over the past two decades.
editorial.culture.guides.4.title: The Club as Community Center
editorial.culture.guides.4.excerpt: Beyond cannabis-how clubs serve as hubs for art, music, and social connection.
editorial.culture.guides.5.title: Madrid vs Barcelona: A Cultural Comparison
editorial.culture.guides.5.excerpt: How the two major cities developed different club cultures and atmospheres.
editorial.etiquette.lead: Every club has its own culture and rules. Learn the unwritten norms, respect the space, and connect with the community like a local.
editorial.etiquette.tip_phone.title: Phones Away
editorial.etiquette.tip_phone.descriptio: Most clubs ask you to keep your phone in your pocket. No photos without explicit permission.
editorial.etiquette.tip_privacy.title: Respect Privacy
editorial.etiquette.tip_privacy.descript: Don't discuss other members or share who you met at the club. What happens in the club stays in the club.
editorial.etiquette.guides.1.title: 5 Mistakes Tourists Make
editorial.etiquette.guides.1.excerpt: Don't be "that" tourist. Learn the local norms and club etiquette before you arrive.
editorial.etiquette.guides.2.title: Photography Rules: What You Need to Know
editorial.etiquette.guides.2.excerpt: Why clubs ban photos and how to respect privacy in shared spaces.
editorial.etiquette.guides.3.title: Tipping and Contribution Culture
editorial.etiquette.guides.3.excerpt: Understanding how clubs fund their operations and member expectations.
editorial.etiquette.guides.4.title: Conversations with Locals
editorial.etiquette.guides.4.excerpt: How to engage respectfully with club members and staff.
editorial.etiquette.guides.5.title: Respecting Club Hierarchy
editorial.etiquette.guides.5.excerpt: Understanding club governance and how decisions are made.
editorial.legal.lead: Spain's relationship with cannabis is nuanced. Unlike Amsterdam's coffee shops, Spain operates under a private association model. Learn what this means for you, your rights, and how to stay compliant.
editorial.legal.key_point_public.title: Public Consumption is Illegal
editorial.legal.key_point_public.descrip: Consuming in public spaces can result in fines starting at EUR601. Always consume inside the private club premises only.
editorial.legal.key_point_private.title: Private Associations are Legal
editorial.legal.key_point_private.descri: Clubs operate as private, non-profit associations. Members can consume on premises when following house rules.
editorial.legal.guides.1.title: Is Weed Legal in Barcelona in 2026?
editorial.legal.guides.1.excerpt: The real rules, fines, and grey areas explained. What every visitor needs to know before arriving.
editorial.legal.guides.2.title: Understanding Public Consumption Laws
editorial.legal.guides.2.excerpt: Why private clubs exist and what happens if you consume in public spaces.
editorial.legal.guides.3.title: Your Rights During Police Interaction
editorial.legal.guides.3.excerpt: What to do if approached by authorities. Know your rights and stay compliant.
editorial.legal.guides.4.title: The Grey Zone Explained
editorial.legal.guides.4.excerpt: Spain's unique legal framework and what it means for club members.
editorial.legal.guides.5.title: Fines and Penalties: A Complete Guide
editorial.legal.guides.5.excerpt: From EUR601 to more serious consequences. Understanding the enforcement landscape.
editorial.legal.disclaimer_body: This information is for educational purposes only and does not constitute legal advice. Laws may change. Consult with a qualified legal professional for advice specific to your situation.
hero.section.sr_title: Social Clubs Maps: Cannabis Social Clubs in Barcelona, Madrid, Tenerife, Valencia compared to dispensaries and coffeeshops in Amsterdam, Los Angeles, Vancouver, and Bangkok.
hero.section.body: Spanish CSCs aren't coffeeshops. No walk-ins. No menus. No second chances.

home.reality_check.title: The Reality Check
home.reality_check.subtitle: Understand the rules before you arrive. Spain is not Amsterdam.
home.reality_check.cards.private.title: Private Associations
home.reality_check.cards.private.descrip: Clubs are private, non-profit organizations, not shops. Membership is required and often vetted.
home.reality_check.cards.id.title: Residency & ID
home.reality_check.cards.id.description: Valid government photo ID is mandatory. Many clubs prioritize local residents over tourists.
home.reality_check.cards.fines.title: Public Fines
home.reality_check.cards.fines.descripti: Public consumption and possession are illegal. Fines start at EUR601. Keep it private.
trust.legal_modal.title: Legal Compliance Check
trust.legal_modal.intro: This platform provides educational content about Cannabis Social Clubs in Spain. We do not sell cannabis. Access is restricted to adults (18+) under Spanish Law (Ley Organica 4/2015).
trust.legal_modal.warning_body: Public consumption is illegal in Spain (fines start at EUR601). This site is for informational purposes only.
